verbatim_map.@@math:5:a01b23@@:
\begin{eqnarray*}
                    \left| z^2-z_0^2\right|&=&\left| z-z_0\right|\left| z+z_0\right|\\
                     &\lt& \delta \left| z+z_0\right|\\
                     &\lt& \delta \left| z-z_0+2z_0\right|\\
                    &\lt& \delta \big( \left| z-z_0\right|+2\left|z_0\right|\big) \\
                    &\lt&\delta \big(1+2\left|z_0\right|\big).
                    \end{eqnarray*}
